titleEn: XAG launches RM80 unmanned mower, unveils new X Series drone system
titleZh: 极飞发布RM80无人割草机及X系列无人机系统
summaryZh: 极飞科技在广州农业机器人大会上推出RM80全电动无人割草机器人（重143kg，双电池续航40分钟，每小时可自主覆盖0.33-0.53公顷）和X系列农业机器人系统（含无人机、XA1充电站、LM1药液混合加注单元）。RM80专为果园管理、土地复垦和田间秸秆清理设计，兼具杂草控制功能；X系列实现充电、混药、加注、清洁全流程自动化，搭载SuperX 5 Apex控制器，计算能力翻倍，测绘效率提升100%。
featuredReason: RM80割草机器人和X系列无人机系统展示了自动化技术在果园管理和植保中的深度应用，其杂草控制机制和全流程无人化工作流对智慧畜牧行业中的饲草料基地管理、牧场环境维护具有直接借鉴价值。
contentFull: XAG launches RM80 unmanned mower, unveils new X Series drone system 10-07 | Smart farming | NewsLinkedInFacebookXWhatsAppPrintThe RM80 is a 143 kg, all-electric mowing robot built for orchard management, land reclamation, and field stubble removal. Photos: XAGXAG has introduced the RM80, an all-electric unmanned mowing robot, alongside a new generation of agricultural drones at a recent Agricultural Robot Conference in Guangzhou, China.The RM80 is a 143 kg, all-electric mowing robot built for orchard management, land reclamation, and field stubble removal. It runs on a dual-battery system delivering up to 40 minutes of operation per charge, reaches a maximum speed of 1.5 m/s, and can handle slopes of up to 30 percent (roughly 16.7 degrees). 4 independent wheel motors provide 8 kW of continuous power, while a lightweight all-aluminum frame and 270 mm of ground clearance are designed to help the machine cope with rough field conditions. Depending on orchard layout, the RM80 can autonomously cover between 0.33 and 0.53 hectares per hour.Beyond mowing, the RM80 also functions as a weed control tool through its stubble removal capability. By finely shredding stubble and weeds down to ground level, the machine exposes weed seeds that would otherwise remain hidden and protected beneath a layer of crop residue, leaving them vulnerable to birds, insects, and weather rather than germinating undisturbed.Clearing or shredding the stubble can also trigger a so-called false seedbed effect, prompting weed seeds to germinate together so they can be eliminated in a single pass. Removing standing stubble additionally eliminates the shelter that allows weeds, pests, and fungal diseases to persist between seasons, and improves the effectiveness of pre-emergent herbicides. Navigation on the mower is handled by XAG’s SuperX 5 Ultra control system, which includes path memory, path planning, automatic return, and one-click cruise control.A new drone series for a fully autonomous workflowAlongside the RM80, XAG unveiled its X Series agricultural robot system, extending the company’s ambitions toward what it describes as a fully autonomous farming workflow. The new X Series extend automation to tasks such as charging, chemical mixing, refilling, and cleaning.The X Series consists of 3 integrated components: the X Series drone itself, the XA1 docking station, and the LM1 chemical mixing and refilling unit. The drone is equipped with the SuperX 5 Apex intelligent controller, offering double the computing power of its predecessor, along with a perception system combining next-generation 4D imaging radar, vertical radar, and wide-area vision. Power line detection accuracy exceeds 90 percent, dual cameras provide 360-degree surround perception, and mapping efficiency has improved by 100 percent, with a single mission now able to survey up to 300 hectares.The XA1 docking station incorporates a mobile dual-antenna RTK base station, allowing high-precision positioning even in areas with complex electromagnetic interference or no network connectivity. When returning to base, the drone docks automatically with precision using near-field positioning, enabling automatic charging and liquid refilling. Its B18630 smart flash battery charges fully in just 3.5 minutes and is rated for 4,000 charge cycles.A single coordinated workflowThe LM1 mixing unit can handle up to eight independent liquid sources at once, using high-precision weighing sensors for accurate quantitative mixing. It supports a maximum refill flow of 60 L/min and includes a one-click deep self-cleaning function for hoses, nozzles, and tanks after each operation. XAG’s move from aerial systems into ground robotics reflects a broader strategy: that genuine smart farming will require multiple types of robots working together across spraying, surveying, mowing, and logistics tasks. By linking these previously separate automation capabilities into a single coordinated workflow, the company is positioning its equipment as permanent nodes within the production system, rather than standalone tools.XAG has not yet publicly disclosed retail pricing for either the RM80 or the new X Series drone system. Region-specific pricing and market packages follow later as local dealers open order books. Because these are modular, final costs are expected to vary according to each buyer’s specific fleet setup.LinkedInFacebookXWhatsAppPrint René Groeneveld Correspondent for AustraliaMore aboutagricultural robotsautonomous technologydrone technologyelectric tractorsrobotic harvestingadLEARN MORERelated articles15-07 | NewsNorwegian robotics firm AutoAgri rebrands as Uncrew Robotics14-07 | NewsSabanto secures oversubscribed funding round, betting on smaller platforms13-07 | NewsEuropean study tour inspires Australian growers02-07 | NewsTersus GNSS AG993: Modular autosteer kit with built-in satellite correction fallback Buyers guides & Catalogues Subscribe to our YouTube channel Taiwan Smart Agriweek 2026Sep 8-10, 2026 TaiNEX 1, Tapei
translationZh:
极飞科技在广州举行的农业机器人大会上推出了RM80全电动无人割草机器人，以及新一代农业无人机。

RM80是一款重143公斤的全电动割草机器人，专为果园管理、土地复垦和田间秸秆清理而设计。它采用双电池系统，每次充电可运行长达40分钟，最高速度达1.5米/秒，并能处理高达30%（约16.7度）的坡度。4个独立轮毂电机提供8千瓦的持续功率，轻量化全铝底盘和270毫米的离地间隙旨在帮助机器应对恶劣的田间条件。根据果园布局，RM80每小时可自主覆盖0.33至0.53公顷。

除了割草，RM80还通过其秸秆清理能力发挥杂草控制工具的作用。通过将秸秆和杂草精细粉碎至地表，机器暴露了原本隐藏并受作物残茬保护的杂草种子，使其暴露于鸟类、昆虫和天气之下，而不是在不受干扰的情况下发芽。清理或粉碎秸秆还能引发所谓的假苗床效应，促使杂草种子一同发芽，从而一次清除。清除直立秸秆还能消除让杂草、害虫和真菌病害在季节间存活的庇护所，并提高芽前除草剂的效果。割草机的导航由极飞的SuperX 5 Ultra控制系统处理，包括路径记忆、路径规划、自动返航和一键巡航控制。

**面向全自主工作流程的新无人机系列**

与RM80一同发布的还有极飞的X系列农业机器人系统，这进一步拓展了公司实现全自主农业工作流程的雄心。新的X系列将自动化扩展到充电、混药、加注和清洁等任务。

X系列由三个集成组件组成：X系列无人机本身、XA1充电站和LM1药液混合加注单元。该无人机配备了SuperX 5 Apex智能控制器，计算能力是前代产品的两倍，同时搭载了结合下一代4D成像雷达、垂直雷达和广域视觉的感知系统。电力线检测精度超过90%，双摄像头提供360度环绕感知，测绘效率提升了100%，单次任务可勘测多达300公顷。

XA1充电站集成了移动式双天线RTK基站，即使在区域内也能实现高精度定位。
author: René Groeneveld
